description: Column sum reduction: compute sum of each column (axis=0) of matrix u.
Apply elementwise exponential to each element using vectorization.
Compute gradient of mean-squared error loss L(w) = mean((x @ w - t)**2) w.r.t. weights w.
Compute gradient of binary cross-entropy (logistic) loss w.r.t. weights w, with sigmoid(x @ w) and labels y_bin in {0,1}.
Implement RNN forward pass over a sequence using jax.lax.scan with tanh cell: h_new = tanh(Ux @ x_t + Uh @ h + c). Output stacked hidden states.
JIT-compile 2-layer MLP forward pass with ReLU nonlinearity: relu(X @ W1 + b1) @ W2 + b2.
